cases.description: Gate 1 fixtures validate exact place identity before any audit evidence search.
expected_checks: ambiguous places ask one focused question
Gate 1 blocks permit, safety, compliance, incident, and earthquake evidence search

cases.description: Gate 2 fixtures lock one of the four earthquake audit questions or all lanes before Gate 3 starts.
expected_checks: scope menu has exactly four earthquake questions
all maps to all four selected lanes

cases.description: Lane 1 without public target-specific NSCP or seismic design-review evidence still produces an availability answer.
expected_checks: answer_text records no public target-specific evidence found
no unsupported safety or compliance claim

cases.description: Lane 3 without official tag/status evidence is not answerable and requires manual OCBO/OBO follow-up.
expected_checks: no unsupported safety or compliance claim

cases.description: Lane 2 with target-specific OBO structural permit or plan-review evidence is answerable without making a current safety claim.
expected_checks: no current safety certification is stated

cases.description: Gate 3 packets preserve manual follow-up custodians and documents when public evidence cannot settle the selected question.
Unsupported earthquake-proof or NSCP-compliant language is blocked before a packet can pass.
Source URLs must be HTTP or HTTPS URLs before a packet can pass.
